name: Marshmallow Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, boiling water, cream of tartar, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches 236°F on a candy thermometer (soft ball stage).
3. Remove from heat and let cool for a minute.
4. Add marshmallows to the egg white mixture and beat until foamy.
5. Gradually add the hot sugar syrup to the marshmallow mixture, beating constantly.
6. Continue beating until thick and creamy.
7. Stir in vanilla extract and salt.
The Household Searchlight
